name: angular-ai-debugger
description: Chrome DevTools extension and local AI engine for Angular runtime debugging and performance analysis.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/shared-types && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/angular-detectors && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/memory-detectors && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/network-detectors && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/performance-detectors && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/rxjs-detectors && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/ai-engine && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/angular-detectors && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/memory-detectors && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/network-detectors && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/performance-detectors && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/rxjs-detectors && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/ai-engine && npm run typecheck -w @angular-ai-debugger/extension
scripts.test: npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/shared-types && npm run build -w @angular-ai-debugger/ai-engine && npm run test -w @angular-ai-debugger/ai-engine --if-present
